top_signals.title: Emerging Currencies Snap Winning Streak as Peace Deal in Doubt
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies sank on waning hopes for a peace deal in the Middle East after a report that Iran had stopped exchanging messages with the US in protest at Israel’s actions in Lebanon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB Consumer Expectations Survey results – April 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FedEx Freight embarks on journey as standalone LTL
top_signals.summary:
The nation’s largest less-than-truckload carrier, FedEx Freight, began trading as a standalone company on Monday.

The post FedEx Freight embarks on journey as standalone LTL appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
